CEN Response Viewer

Response 215011931

Arizona Collegiate Sales Competition Sponsorship

Public Service (PS) - activity is primarily ASU-led education, training, or public programming.

Activity Basics

Question

Activity Description (Short)

Canon agreed to a 3-year ($135K) sponsorship for the Arizona Collegiate Sales Competition. That also includes a 'gold' level sponsorship for the Professional Sales Program.

Question

Start Date

2025-07-01 (inferred from FY26 survey window)

2026-06-30 (inferred from FY26 survey window)
